items.title: Sonam Wangchuk hunger strike LIVE: Police hospitalise Wangchuk; CJP's Dipke begins indefinite hunger strike at Jantar Mantar
items.summary: Nothing should be administered to Sonam Wangchuk without my consent, says wife Gitanjali Angmo, as activist removed from Jantar Mantar protest site
